## Week in Review: 2026-03-22 to 2026-03-28

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 23.7.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 3.1 (-24.1% WoW), sentiment: negative (-0.14)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 2.1 (-28.6% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.12)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 1.9 (-35.0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 23.7 (-4.6% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.10)
